title: ErrorResponse
description: Standardized backend error response schema. Internal details (e.g. database errors, stack traces, raw Selcom keys) must never be returned in this schema.

code.description: Standardized error code string for frontend categorization.

message.description: A user-friendly, sanitized summary of the error.

details.description: Detailed validation failures or field issues.

field.description: The request field causing the issue.

issue.description: A specific description of the field validation failure.
